message:
test(unistd_abi): expand unistd test coverage from 29 to 70 tests

Cover getpid/getppid/getuid/geteuid/getgid/getegid, getcwd/chdir,
open/read/write/close/lseek/creat, stat/fstat/lstat, access/faccessat,
link/symlink/readlink/unlink, mkdir/rmdir/rename, chmod/fchmod/chown/
fchown, truncate/ftruncate, fsync/fdatasync, flock, pipe, umask,
gethostname, uname, sysconf, pathconf, alarm, usleep, isatty, mkfifo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
